title: Gombong Heat Wave
lead: Gombong is experiencing a critical heat wave with a Z-Score of +3.26. The event has reached a score of 10.0/10, indicating extreme conditions.
body:
The current heat wave in Gombong has led to extremely high temperatures, with a Cooling Degree Days (CDD) value of 10.4 GG. 
 The relative humidity is at 78%, and the wind speed is 5.0 km/h, exacerbating the heat. 
 The Heating Degree Days (HDD) value is 0.0 GG, indicating no relief from the heat.
conclusion: Activate emergency response protocols immediately to mitigate the effects of the heat wave.
